events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: staged materials for terminations & splices, wrong wirenut size observed. NEC 110.14 requires terminations be made with suitable connectors, proper sizes. Wrong wirenut size is non-compliant/installed-defective (though staged, not installed yet, but the material choice is wrong). Decision should be fail because non-compliant. Risk medium maybe. Work stage staged. Percent complete 0. Component conditions: non-compliant (wrong material selected). Findings: wrong wirenut size for the conductor combination. Actions: select correct wirenut per manufacturer's wire range chart. Rationale: NEC 110.14 requires connectors suitable for conductor material and size; wrong wirenut won't make adequate connection.

  ],
  "rationale": "NEC 110.14 requires terminations and splices to be made with identified connectors suitable for the conductor material, size, and number of conductors. A wrong-size wirenut will not reliably secure the splice, creating a poor connection, overheating, or failure risk.",
  "references": ["NEC 110.14"]
}
